reviews.title: What Our Clients Say
reviews.subtitle: Trusted by hundreds of happy clients in Ilioupoli.

review1.name: Maria
review1.text: Excellent environment, excellent nail work!! I've been coming here for years and the quality never drops.

review2.name: Katerina
review2.text: For 6 consecutive years, every 15 days I trust 4 Your Nails services. Flawless manicure and pedicure.

review3.name: Sofia
review3.text: Professional and friendly staff. Clean and comfortable spaces! My go-to nail salon in Ilioupoli.

story.title: Our Story
story.text: Located in the heart of Ilioupoli, 4 Your Nails has been providing exceptional nail care and beauty services since 2018. We're proud to have been recognized with the Golden Company Award for our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction.
story.text2: Our team of skilled professionals is passionate about making every client feel pampered and beautiful. From classic manicures to creative nail art, we bring precision, care, and creativity to every service.

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: Meet the talented professionals behind your perfect nails.

award.title: Award-Winning Quality
award.text: We're honored to have received the Golden Company Award, recognizing our dedication to excellence in nail care and beauty services.

ContactPage.title: Visit Us
ContactPage.subtitle: We'd love to see you. Book online or drop by our salon.
